description: False-colour infrared satellite image of the Military airport at Wilhelmswöerth, Germany, captured on 2010-07-14 by SPOT-5 (2.5m) using a 1/2/3 Band Combination. The image shows the airport infrastructure, including long, light blue/cyan runways and associated buildings, centrally positioned within a landscape of agricultural fields and vegetated areas. Healthy vegetation, such as forested patches and some cultivated fields, appears in various shades of red, with denser vegetation appearing darker red. Areas with less vegetation or bare soil appear in tones of green. Small, dark blue/black water bodies are visible within some vegetated zones. The image illustrates the physical appearance of a military airport for land cover classification purposes, consistent with Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) guidelines. Source: CNES 2011©, Distribution Airbus DS/Spot Image.
